changes.text: Live follower/following count monitoring — detects count changes while browsing Strava and prompts a rescan when your counts diverge from the last scan
Rescan banner appears at the top of the page (full-width, orange background) when a count change is detected
Follower/following scan now uses real browser tab navigation instead of direct fetch requests, fixing Strava's SSR-only HTML response behaviour
Scan page limit is now honoured by the tab-based scan (user-configurable via Follow Tracker settings)
Backup export/import now strips internal scan-state keys (`ftScanStatus`, `ftNetworkPending`, `ftLastParseError`)
Sidebar tabs reordered for improved workflow
Extension version in exported backup now read from the manifest (was previously hardcoded)
Rescan banner no longer dismisses prematurely on an idle status before the scan has started
Follower count element selector updated to use a resilient `data-testid` attribute instead of a fragile CSS class name
`DOMContentLoaded` race condition in network interceptor resolved — handler fires immediately when the DOM is already loaded
Scan timeout now correctly cleared when the tab scan responds successfully
Removed unreachable fetch-based scan pipeline from scanner.js (superseded by tab-based scan)

releases.description: Follow Tracker — scan follower/following lists, detect new follows and unfollows over time, with configurable limits and full history log.

changes.text: Follow Tracker tab in the Strava sidebar — scan follower and following lists, detect new follows and unfollows over time
Filterable scan history log with period and type dropdowns, and summary counts
User-configurable scan page limit in Follow Tracker settings
Danger Zone — clear all Follow Tracker data with a typed RESET confirmation
What's New banner shown on extension update, dismissed per version
Resizable sidebar panel with drag handle (size persists across sessions)
Revamped About tab with collapsible sections and version history
Default tab now activated correctly on popup load
Removed duplicate FT_DEBUG_LOGGING constant declaration

releases.description: Feed filter and bulk kudos fixes — profile pages no longer filtered, status layout corrected, own activities skipped in bulk kudos.

changes.text: Filters no longer applied on athlete profile pages — filter state preserved and resumes on return to the dashboard
Bulk kudos counter and filter info text no longer overwrite each other — split into two separate rows in the status area
Bulk kudos no longer targets the logged-in user's own activities — own activities detected and skipped

releases.description: Bulk kudos — give kudos to all visible un-kudo'd activities with a single click.

changes.text: Bulk kudos button next to the group filter dropdown — one click to kudo all visible un-kudo'd activities
Progress indicator shows kudos count during bulk operation
Pulsing animation on button while bulk kudos are in progress

releases.description: Persistent filter state and stability fixes.

changes.text: Persist athlete selection across page reloads
Persist active group filter across page reloads
Fixed infinite recursion in alphabeticalSort in popup.js

releases.description: Initial release — custom athlete groups, feed filtering, and browser store listings.

changes.text: Create and manage custom athlete groups
Filter Strava feed by group, ungrouped athletes, or activities without kudos
Group labels on following/followers pages
Batch athlete selection with paginated sidebar UI
Export/import groups for backup and cross-browser transfer
Local storage only — no data sent to external servers
Firefox and Chrome support (Manifest V3)
